import torch
import torch.nn as nn
from transformers import CLIPModel

class CLIPWildlifeClassifier(nn.Module):
    def __init__(self, model_name='openai/clip-vit-base-patch16', num_classes=182, dropout=0.0):
        super().__init__()
        self.clip = CLIPModel.from_pretrained(model_name)
        # Freeze CLIP? Initially not, later maybe.
        # Use only the vision model
        vision_config = self.clip.config.vision_config
        self.classifier = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Dropout(dropout),
            nn.Linear(vision_config.hidden_size, num_classes)
        )
        self.feature_dim = vision_config.hidden_size

    def forward(self, pixel_values):
        # pixel_values: (B, 3, 224, 224)
        vision_outputs = self.clip.vision_model(pixel_values=pixel_values)
        # pooled output (CLS token) - shape (B, hidden_size)
        image_embeds = vision_outputs.pooler_output
        logits = self.classifier(image_embeds)
        return logits

    def get_features(self, pixel_values):
        vision_outputs = self.clip.vision_model(pixel_values=pixel_values)
        return vision_outputs.pooler_output
